items.title: Repository memory spine
acceptance: Runtime reads repository memory during understanding.

items.title: Remote CI gate
acceptance: GitHub Actions runs Loop runtime tests.
GitHub Actions runs tea finance build and database tests.

items.title: PR automation contract
acceptance: GitHub connector emits branch, commit, push, PR, checks, and merge workflow plan.
Remote status checks are represented as merge gate artifacts.

items.title: Regression candidate capture
acceptance: Failures are written to repository memory.
Blocked intent debt is written to intent_debt.jsonl.
Regression policy exists in repository memory.

items.title: Browser UI verification contract
acceptance: UI verification checklist exists for managed projects.
Loop can require browser verification before production release.

items.title: Production risk gate
acceptance: Production writes require explicit approval and cannot auto-retry.
